final:
module RefModule(
  input wire clka,
  input wire ena,
  input wire [3:0] addra,
  input wire [3:0] dina,
  output reg [3:0] douta  // Changed from wire to reg
);reg [3:0] mem [0:15];

  always @(posedge clka) begin
  if (ena) begin mem[addra] <= dina ; end
  end

  always @(posedge clka) begin
  douta <= mem[addra] ;
  end

endmodule
